make sure its features buying xrp coins  in the landing pages and firstly
   using the render api token help me move all the projects and domain
   connected there to this new rrender account api token
   rnd_Ol1Du7RHPzEGIahhSxAuyzO1OPq4

thoughts.subject: Implementing XRP Purchase Flow
thoughts.description: I'm currently focused on integrating the XRP coin purchase functionality into the landing pages. Simultaneously, I'm working on migrating projects and domains from the legacy Render account to the new one, utilizing the provided API token for this transfer.

thoughts.subject: Addressing Token Exposure
thoughts.description: I'm prioritizing the immediate security concern of the exposed API token. My focus is now on understanding the implications and researching how to securely proceed with the requested actions, specifically regarding the transfer of projects within Render, given the sensitive nature of the token.

thoughts.subject: Investigating Token Security
thoughts.description: My immediate priority is addressing the security implications of the exposed API token. I'm researching methods to securely manage this, avoiding its storage, and investigating Render's API capabilities for transferring services and domains between accounts. Concurrently, I am reviewing relevant codebase files to plan the integration of the XRP purchase feature.

$set.summary: Migrate Render projects and add XRP purchase feature to landing pages.
